TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O kitoh to tilid Itiya ho ira koya tatoloay masa'opo. Ya mitilid, miala ko mira to pitilidan, cecay i, tilidan nira ko tilid i kilang no hinoki, cecay i, tilidan nira i kilang no 'araway, cecay i, tilidan nira i fakeloh. Maherek to naira a militild i, panengelan naira i nanom. Oya hinoki a kilang i, mapawpaway, mahapingany ho koya tilid. Oya nitlidan i kilang no 'araway, tatiihay a tiliden toya kilang i, mansa mapawpaw koya kilang cowa kahapinang koya tilid.ya nitilidan i fakeloh i, matekengay awa to a ma'araw. Ya mitiliday to tilid i kilang no hinoki i, miliyasay awaay to a minokay, o malitengay no Dipong ko mira. Ya mitiliday i kilang no 'araway i, o malitengay no Taywan. Ya mitiliday i fakeloh a tamdaw i, o malitengay no 'Amis. Onini ko sakaawa no 'Amis a tilid, hay mahidayay to tilid no mira. Ora kitoh i kafekang i, o nani kaDipongan ho a kitoh. o nikilokan no Dipong i Taywan itiya ho konini a sowal. O pikitoh to to sakaawa no 'Amis, roma sato o pipakafana' to kaadihay ato kaidahi no Dipong to sakitilid, ona pipili' no malitengay naira to pitilidan a kilang no hinoki ko sakaira no tilid naira. O Payrang hanto i, ano cowa katootoor to pikilok no Dipong to tilid i, ka ira ho ko nanoliteng naira a tilid. Pakayni tona kitoh no tilid i, mapahapinang ko kasiroma ato kaidahi no serangawan no Dipong ato Payrang to 'Amis, mahapinang haca ko pipaini no 'Amis to nairaay to ko tilid no 'Amis itiya ho. .
S.PHON: o~u kito~uńß to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ itija ńßo~u ira ko~uja tato~u…ĺo~uaj masa °o~upo~u. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mia…ĺa ko~u mira to~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß. mańß…ôr…ôk to~u naira a mi…ĺiti…ĺ…¨~…ģ i, pan…ôŇč…ô…ĺan naira i nano~um. o~uja ńßino~uki a ki…ĺaŇč i, mapawpawaj, mańßapiŇčanj ńßo~u ko~uja ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. o~uja nit…ĺi…¨~…ģan i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj, tatiińßaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ…ôn to~uja ki…ĺaŇč i, mansa mapawpaw ko~uja ki…ĺaŇč ¶o~uwa kańßapinaŇč ko~uja ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ.ja niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß i, mat…ôk…ôŇčaj awa to~u a ma °araw. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki i, mi…ĺijasaj awaaj to~u a mino~ukaj, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ko~u mira. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj i, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u tajwan. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u °amis. o~unini ko~u sakaawa no~u °amis a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ńßaj mańßi…¨~…ģajaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mira. o~ura kito~uńß i kaf…ôkaŇč i, o~u nani ka…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan ńßo~u a kito~uńß. o~u niki…ĺo~ukan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč i tajwan itija ńßo~u ko~unini a so~uwa…ĺ. o~u pikito~uńß to~u to~u sakaawa no~u °amis, ro~uma sato~u o~u pipakafana ° to~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj ato~u kai…¨~…ģańßi no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u sakiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, o~una pipi…ĺi ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj naira to~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki ko~u sakaira no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ naira. o~u pajraŇč ńßanto~u i, ano~u ¶o~uwa kato~uo~uto~uo~ur to~u piki…ĺo~uk no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i, ka ira ńßo~u ko~u nano~u…ĺit…ôŇč naira a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. pakajni to~una kito~uńß no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i, mapańßapinaŇč ko~u kasiro~uma ato~u kai…¨~…ģańßi no~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u pajraŇč to~u °amis, mańßapinaŇč ńßa ¶a ko~u pipaini no~u °amis to~u nairaaj to~u ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u °amis itija ńßo~u. .
S.FORM: O kitoh to tilid Itiya ho ira koya tatoloay masa'opo. Ya mitilid, miala ko mira to pitilidan, cecay i, tilidan nira ko tilid i kilang no hinoki, cecay i, tilidan nira i kilang no 'araway, cecay i, tilidan nira i fakeloh. Maherek to naira a militild i, panengelan naira i nanom. Oya hinoki a kilang i, mapawpaway, mahapingany ho koya tilid. Oya nitlidan i kilang no 'araway, tatiihay a tiliden toya kilang i, mansa mapawpaw koya kilang cowa kahapinang koya tilid.ya nitilidan i fakeloh i, matekengay awa to a ma'araw. Ya mitiliday to tilid i kilang no hinoki i, miliyasay awaay to a minokay, o malitengay no Dipong ko mira. Ya mitiliday i kilang no 'araway i, o malitengay no Taywan. Ya mitiliday i fakeloh a tamdaw i, o malitengay no 'Amis. Onini ko sakaawa no 'Amis a tilid, hay mahidayay to tilid no mira. Ora kitoh i kafekang i, o nani kaDipongan ho a kitoh. o nikilokan no Dipong i Taywan itiya ho konini a sowal. O pikitoh to to sakaawa no 'Amis, roma sato o pipakafana' to kaadihay ato kaidahi no Dipong to sakitilid, ona pipili' no malitengay naira to pitilidan a kilang no hinoki ko sakaira no tilid naira. O Payrang hanto i, ano cowa katootoor to pikilok no Dipong to tilid i, ka ira ho ko nanoliteng naira a tilid. Pakayni tona kitoh no tilid i, mapahapinang ko kasiroma ato kaidahi no serangawan no Dipong ato Payrang to 'Amis, mahapinang haca ko pipaini no 'Amis to nairaay to ko tilid no 'Amis itiya ho. .
S.PHON: o~u kito~uńß to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ itija ńßo~u ira ko~uja tato~u…ĺo~uaj masa °o~upo~u. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, mia…ĺa ko~u mira to~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj, ¶…ô ¶aj i, ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan nira i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß. mańß…ôr…ôk to~u naira a mi…ĺiti…ĺ…¨~…ģ i, pan…ôŇč…ô…ĺan naira i nano~um. o~uja ńßino~uki a ki…ĺaŇč i, mapawpawaj, mańßapiŇčanj ńßo~u ko~uja ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. o~uja nit…ĺi…¨~…ģan i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj, tatiińßaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ…ôn to~uja ki…ĺaŇč i, mansa mapawpaw ko~uja ki…ĺaŇč ¶o~uwa kańßapinaŇč ko~uja ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ.ja niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß i, mat…ôk…ôŇčaj awa to~u a ma °araw. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki i, mi…ĺijasaj awaaj to~u a mino~ukaj, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ko~u mira. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i ki…ĺaŇč no~u °arawaj i, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u tajwan. ja miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i fak…ô…ĺo~uńß a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj no~u °amis. o~unini ko~u sakaawa no~u °amis a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, ńßaj mańßi…¨~…ģajaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u mira. o~ura kito~uńß i kaf…ôkaŇč i, o~u nani ka…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan ńßo~u a kito~uńß. o~u niki…ĺo~ukan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč i tajwan itija ńßo~u ko~unini a so~uwa…ĺ. o~u pikito~uńß to~u to~u sakaawa no~u °amis, ro~uma sato~u o~u pipakafana ° to~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj ato~u kai…¨~…ģańßi no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u sakiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ, o~una pipi…ĺi ° no~u ma…ĺit…ôŇčaj naira to~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan a ki…ĺaŇč no~u ńßino~uki ko~u sakaira no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ naira. o~u pajraŇč ńßanto~u i, ano~u ¶o~uwa kato~uo~uto~uo~ur to~u piki…ĺo~uk no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i, ka ira ńßo~u ko~u nano~u…ĺit…ôŇč naira a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. pakajni to~una kito~uńß no~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ i, mapańßapinaŇč ko~u kasiro~uma ato~u kai…¨~…ģańßi no~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u pajraŇč to~u °amis, mańßapinaŇč ńßa ¶a ko~u pipaini no~u °amis to~u nairaaj to~u ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u °amis itija ńßo~u. .
